{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant & Admin Officer",
  "description": "Citimobile Media Limited is a Nigerian-based out-of-home (OOH) advertising and 360 marketing communications company. They&#39;re headquartered in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. They specialize in bespoke OOH advertising services with innovative solutions like LED screens, gantry eye catchers, and bus branding. Their products include LED screens, billboards, light boxes, and lamp posts at strategic locations in Lagos and Ibadan. They focus on bridging the gap between brands and consumers, with a belief that their outdoor advertising platforms promise high ROI and optimum brand awareness. The company emphasizes staying updated on the latest outdoor advertising practices and tailoring their approach to meet each client&#39;s unique needs. They&#39;ve also built capabilities in digital marketing, positioning themselves as a comprehensive marketing communications agency rather than just traditional OOH.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant &amp; Admin Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will manage and oversee the company&rsquo;s financial operations, including bookkeeping, accounts payable and receivable, payroll support, and financial reporting.
	The role requires maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, and supporting efficient day-to-day accounting operations that contribute to business growth


Roles &amp; Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate records of all financial transactions, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger entries
	Prepare timely financial reports, statements, and summaries for management review
	Assist in budget preparation and monitor expenditure against approved budgets
	Ensure timely disbursement of funds for company operations, including operational expenses
	Process employee reimbursement requests accurately and promptly
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, internal policies, and tax requirements
	Monitor and manage cash flow to meet operational and financial obligations
	Manage invoicing and billing processes efficiently
	Follow up on outstanding payments and support debt recovery efforts
	Liaise with vendors and internal teams to ensure effective financial operations
	Maintain organized financial records and supporting documents for audits and reviews
	Suggest and implement improvements to accounting processes for better efficiency
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Education &amp; Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3+ years of relevant experience in accounting and administrative functions
	ACCA, ICAN, or CPA certification is an added advantage
	Experience in VAT filing and compliance
	Familiarity with Etax Pro Max software
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations


Skills &amp; Competence:


	Accounting and financial reporting
	Budgeting and cash flow management
	Invoicing, billing, and debt recovery management
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Analytical and problem-solving skills
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Good communication and organisational skills.


Salary
N300,000 - N320,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@citimobilemedia.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Candidates who reside within close proximity to the office location (Lekki Phase 1) will be given preference.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-11",

Accountant & Admin Officer Job at Citimobile Media Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Citimobile Media Limited is a Nigerian-based out-of-home (OOH) advertising and 360 marketing communications company. They're headquartered in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. They specialize in bespoke OOH advertising services with innovative solutions like LED screens, gantry eye catchers, and bus branding. Their products include LED screens, billboards, light boxes, and lamp posts at strategic locations in Lagos and Ibadan. They focus on bridging the gap between brands and consumers, with a belief that their outdoor advertising platforms promise high ROI and optimum brand awareness. The company emphasizes staying updated on the latest outdoor advertising practices and tailoring their approach to meet each client's unique needs. They've also built capabilities in digital marketing, positioning themselves as a comprehensive marketing communications agency rather than just traditional OOH.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant & Admin Officer
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will manage and oversee the company’s financial operations, including bookkeeping, accounts payable and receivable, payroll support, and financial reporting.
	The role requires maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, and supporting efficient day-to-day accounting operations that contribute to business growth


Roles & Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate records of all financial transactions, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger entries
	Prepare timely financial reports, statements, and summaries for management review
	Assist in budget preparation and monitor expenditure against approved budgets
	Ensure timely disbursement of funds for company operations, including operational expenses
	Process employee reimbursement requests accurately and promptly
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, internal policies, and tax requirements
	Monitor and manage cash flow to meet operational and financial obligations
	Manage invoicing and billing processes efficiently
	Follow up on outstanding payments and support debt recovery efforts
	Liaise with vendors and internal teams to ensure effective financial operations
	Maintain organized financial records and supporting documents for audits and reviews
	Suggest and implement improvements to accounting processes for better efficiency
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Education & Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3+ years of relevant experience in accounting and administrative functions
	ACCA, ICAN, or CPA certification is an added advantage
	Experience in VAT filing and compliance
	Familiarity with Etax Pro Max software
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations


Skills & Competence:


	Accounting and financial reporting
	Budgeting and cash flow management
	Invoicing, billing, and debt recovery management
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Analytical and problem-solving skills
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Good communication and organisational skills.


Salary
N300,000 - N320,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates who reside within close proximity to the office location (Lekki Phase 1) will be given    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Spesa Food Eatery Manager",
  "description": "Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited &nbsp;- Our client,&nbsp;Spesa Eatery is the food service arm of Spesa Super Store, serving fresh, affordable, and high-quality meals to individuals, families, and corporate customers in Ikorodu. Since our launch, we have experienced steady growth and increasing customer traffic.&nbsp;

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Spesa Food Eatery Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Eatery Manager will be responsible for supervising daily operations, managing staff, ensuring food quality standards, controlling costs, and driving sales performance.
	The ideal candidate must be organized, proactive, and experienced in managing a busy food business.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily eatery operations to ensure smooth and efficient service
	Supervise kitchen staff, servers, and support team members
	Ensure high standards of food quality, taste, presentation, and hygiene
	Monitor portion control and reduce food wastage
	Track daily sales, expenses, and profitability
	Prepare daily and weekly operational reports for management
	Manage inventory, food supplies, and vendor relationships
	Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations
	Handle customer complaints and maintain high customer satisfaction
	Develop strategies to increase sales and improve operational efficiency
	Enforce discipline, punctuality, and teamwork among staff


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	HND / B.Sc. in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field (preferred)
	3&ndash;5 years of experience managing a restaurant, eatery, or food service business
	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Good understanding of food costing, inventory control, and sales reporting
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
	Strong organizational and multitasking ability
	Must reside in Ikorodu or nearby areas


Key Skills &amp; Attributes:


	Leadership and staff coordination
	Strong financial and cost-control awareness
	Customer service excellence
	Decision-making and accountability
	Attention to detail and operational discipline.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to lead a growing food brand
	Career growth opportunities within Spesa
	Supportive and structured work environment.

Spesa Food Eatery Manager Job at Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Syx-Brij Nigeria Limited  - Our client, Spesa Eatery is the food service arm of Spesa Super Store, serving fresh, affordable, and high-quality meals to individuals, families, and corporate customers in Ikorodu. Since our launch, we have experienced steady growth and increasing customer traffic. 

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Spesa Food Eatery Manager

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Eatery Manager will be responsible for supervising daily operations, managing staff, ensuring food quality standards, controlling costs, and driving sales performance.
	The ideal candidate must be organized, proactive, and experienced in managing a busy food business.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily eatery operations to ensure smooth and efficient service
	Supervise kitchen staff, servers, and support team members
	Ensure high standards of food quality, taste, presentation, and hygiene
	Monitor portion control and reduce food wastage
	Track daily sales, expenses, and profitability
	Prepare daily and weekly operational reports for management
	Manage inventory, food supplies, and vendor relationships
	Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations
	Handle customer complaints and maintain high customer satisfaction
	Develop strategies to increase sales and improve operational efficiency
	Enforce discipline, punctuality, and teamwork among staff


Requirements & Qualifications


	HND / B.Sc. in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field (preferred)
	3–5 years of experience managing a restaurant, eatery, or food service business
	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Good understanding of food costing, inventory control, and sales reporting
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
	Strong organizational and multitasking ability
	Must reside in Ikorodu or nearby areas


Key Skills & Attributes:


	Leadership and staff coordination
	Strong financial and cost-control awareness
	Customer service excellence
	Decision-making and accountability
	Attention to detail and operational discipline.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to lead a growing food brand
	Career growth opportunities within Spesa
	Supportive and structured work environment.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Unit Secretary Job at O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise




        
    

        
        O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise, based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a registered business specializing in thesales, supply, and distribution of general goods, general merchandise, and general contracting services. Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), the enterprise operates in areas such as manufacturing, warehousing, and sales executive roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Unit Secretary

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Schedule appointments and follow-up exams as instructed by Doctors
	File paperwork and keep all patient information updated in our system
	Administer and maintain patient records for use by our medical professionals
	Order office and medical supplies as needed


Requirements and skills


	High school diploma or equivalent is preferred.
	Proven work experience as a Unit Secretary or similar role
	Knowledge of medical terminology
	Proficiency with medical software
	Excellent computer literacy skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Manager",
  "description": "O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise, based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a registered business specializing in thesales, supply, and distribution of general goods, general merchandise, and general contracting services. Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), the enterprise operates in areas such as manufacturing, warehousing, and sales executive roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Assist the Retail Store Manager in planning and implementing strategies to attract customers
	Coordinate daily customer service operations (e.g. sales processes, orders and payments)
	Track the progress of weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual objectives
	Monitor and maintain store inventory
	Evaluate employee performance and identify hiring and training needs
	Supervise and motivate staff to perform their best
	Coach and support new and existing Sales Associates
	Monitor retail operating costs, budgets and resources
	Suggest sales training programs and techniques
	Communicate with clients and evaluate their needs
	Analyze consumer behavior and adjust product positioning
	Handle complaints from customers
	Research emerging products and use information to update the store&rsquo;s merchandise
	Create reports, analyze and interpret retail data, like revenues, expenses and competition
	Conduct regular audits to ensure the store is functionable and presentable
	Make sure all employees adhere to company&rsquo;s policies and guidelines
	Act as our store&rsquo;s representative and set an example for our staff.


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as a Retail Assistant Manager or similar position
	Experience with recruiting and performance evaluation processes
	Familiarity with financial and customer service principles
	Good math skills with the ability to create and analyze reports, spreadsheets and sales statistics
	Proficient user of MS Office (MS Excel in particular)
	Leadership and organizational abilities
	Interpersonal and communication skills
	Problem-solving attitude
	Flexibility to work in shifts.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hropeeniceglobent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198632"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

Assistant Manager Job at O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise




        
    

        
        O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise, based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a registered business specializing in thesales, supply, and distribution of general goods, general merchandise, and general contracting services. Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), the enterprise operates in areas such as manufacturing, warehousing, and sales executive roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist the Retail Store Manager in planning and implementing strategies to attract customers
	Coordinate daily customer service operations (e.g. sales processes, orders and payments)
	Track the progress of weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual objectives
	Monitor and maintain store inventory
	Evaluate employee performance and identify hiring and training needs
	Supervise and motivate staff to perform their best
	Coach and support new and existing Sales Associates
	Monitor retail operating costs, budgets and resources
	Suggest sales training programs and techniques
	Communicate with clients and evaluate their needs
	Analyze consumer behavior and adjust product positioning
	Handle complaints from customers
	Research emerging products and use information to update the store’s merchandise
	Create reports, analyze and interpret retail data, like revenues, expenses and competition
	Conduct regular audits to ensure the store is functionable and presentable
	Make sure all employees adhere to company’s policies and guidelines
	Act as our store’s representative and set an example for our staff.


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as a Retail Assistant Manager or similar position
	Experience with recruiting and performance evaluation processes
	Familiarity with financial and customer service principles
	Good math skills with the ability to create and analyze reports, spreadsheets and sales statistics
	Proficient user of MS Office (MS Excel in particular)
	Leadership and organizational abilities
	Interpersonal and communication skills
	Problem-solving attitude
	Flexibility to work in shifts.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
